demographics.living_situation: shares a house with a roommate

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: It feels like there is a shard of glass scraping my eye every time I blink, and everything is blurry.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly a couple of hours ago while I was sanding some wood and it's gotten really bad — the eye is streaming and I can't stand any light.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 2 hours ago, suddenly, while I was sanding a piece of wood without any goggles on
symptom_narrative.duration: around 2 hours and it's not settling
symptom_narrative.character: started as a gritty feeling like there was sand in it, then turned into a sharp, stabbing, scraping pain every time I blink
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really bad — one of the worst pains I've had, I can't keep the eye open
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: keeping the eye shut and the lights off helps a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: blinking, and any bright light makes it much worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: the eye is watering non-stop and my vision on that side has gone blurry
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't really see to move around safely and the light is unbearable

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: was doing home woodworking/sanding with a power tool and wasn't wearing safety glasses

objective_data_offered.value: the right eye looks very red and is streaming with tears; patient is holding it shut and shielding his face from the light
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: gross appearance over a phone/video only — no magnified or stained view possible

objective_data_offered.value: vision in the right eye is blurry compared with the other eye
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-assessed, not a measured visual acuity

objective_data_offered.value: roommate says he can't keep the eye open, is in a lot of pain, and they have had to keep the room lights off
wood dust on the patient's clothing; no safety glasses were being worn at the time
